hero.name: Florencia
hero.title: Research Fellow · Information Systems Engineering
hero.description: Empirical software engineering researcher with experience in agile estimation, systematic literature reviews, and international innovation projects. Passionate about software quality and AI-assisted engineering.

about.label: About
about.title: Learn more about my journey
about.subtitle: Advanced Information Systems Engineering student with a research profile.
about.bio1: Final-year Information Systems Engineering student at UTN (Argentina) with research experience in empirical software engineering, agile estimation, and systematic literature reviews. I have contributed to multiple research projects focused on software quality and agile team productivity, co-authored scientific publications, and participated in international innovation competitions.
about.bio2: My work spans academic research, survey design and analysis, interdisciplinary collaboration, and AI-assisted approaches for agile estimation. I am particularly interested in AI-assisted software development, agile methodologies, and empirical software engineering.

experience.label: Experience
experience.title: Professional & research trajectory
experience.subtitle: Over 3 years of experience in academic research and international projects.

bullets: Systematic literature reviews in agile environments.
Research on software quality, agile estimation, and production capacity.
Survey design and analysis for industry professionals.
AI and IoT solution for mental health support.
Solution design, impact analysis, and interdisciplinary collaboration.
